# readyForMoreMediaDataDidChange

**Type Property**

A notification that indicates a change to the object’s readiness to process additional media data.

## Declaration

```swift
static let readyForMoreMediaDataDidChange: NSNotification.Name
```

## Discussion

This notification is used to notify Video Toolbox that the value of the [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MERAWProcessor/isReadyForMoreMediaData] property has changed.
title: readyForMoreMediaDataDidChange
